title: FAMILY CARE - 211info
text: HARNEY DISTRICT HOSPITAL FAMILY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Family practice and community clinic. Services include prenatal care, well child checks, immunizations, and general medical care for all ages. Visiting health care providers also provide specialty care services. 557 W Washington Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 573-2074 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-2074 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts all insurance plans, including Medicare DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Behavioral Learning Therapy Nutrition Education Obstetrics/Gynecology Pain Management Speech Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HARNEY DISTRICT HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HARNEY DISTRICT HOSPITAL
